sections.title: New Features
items:
F2 screenshot support added directly to the game — works in both Vulkan and Classic (D3D11) render
  backends
Screenshots are saved as timestamped PNGs to a screenshots/ folder next to the game executable
Skin wardrobe system — store multiple skins in the launcher and switch between them without re-uploading
Skin wardrobe supports add, rename, remove, and apply operations with thumbnail previews
Active skin is indicated with a teal dot in the wardrobe grid
Removed version/branch overlay text from the top-left corner of the screen
Screenshots page now correctly reads from the active installation's screenshots folder

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed launcher options and keybinds not actually applying to the game

Fixed settings being overwritten by the game on startup — launcher now re-applies settings after the game's
   initial write

Fixed keybind display showing wrong key names — now sourced directly from the game's internal key table
  (A=0..Z=25)
Fixed number keys 1–9 mapping incorrectly in the keybinds screen
Fixed launcher reading options.txt from the wrong directory — now uses the active installation path
Fixed screenshots page using wrong game directory

sections.title: Improvements
items: Keybinds section now correctly appears in the Options page
Options page shows the exact file path being edited
Options page has a Reload from disk button
Launcher keybind table is now authoritative — sourced from stubs.cpp s_keyToVK[]

sections.title: New Features
items: Added mod support — mods can now be enabled and disabled from the launcher
Mods are automatically copied to the game directory on launch
SkinMod support for custom player skins via mods/customskin.png
Dynamic Lights mod support for handheld light sources
Minimap mod support
WAILA (What Am I Looking At) mod support
Zoom mod support
VeinMiner mod support
TreeMiner mod support
Offhand mod support
Litematica mod support for structure placement
Mod metadata display (name, version, author, description) in the Mods tab

sections.title: New Features
items: Full keyboard and mouse support with overhauled input system
Chat system with paste and text formatting support
Sensitivity slider now affects mouse sensitivity
F1 key toggles HUD visibility
Smooth scrolling in Creative Mode menu
Fullscreen mode and launch argument for fullscreen
DPI awareness with auto-detect screen resolution
Skip tutorial option
Shift+click for quick item move in inventory
TAB key opens host options
Offline player UIDs (uid.dat) for multiplayer save persistence
LittleBigPlanet Skin Pack added
Java Edition music tracks

sections.title: Bug Fixes
items: Fixed dangling pointer crash
Fixed mounted minecarts not persisting across world reloads
Fixed tamed horses despawning when player moves away
Fixed DLC map loading/saving and missing chunks
Fixed Enderman and monster aggro in creative mode
Fixed bonus chests spawning on world reload
Fixed HUD incorrectly showing 0 hearts
Fixed SubEntity hitbox hit detection
Fixed mouse being pulled to the bottom right corner
Fixed quiet in-game audio after engine update
Fixed stained glass wrong colors
Fixed boat gravity
Fixed ender dragon hit not turning screen red on left side
Fixed background stretching in Settings > Graphics menu
Fixed split screen server joining
Fixed witch bottle color
Fixed logo rendering after closing host options
Fixed gamma breaking the F3 debug menu
Fixed player save data and username handling
Fixed exit button sound

sections.title: Performance
items: Chunk loading optimizations
Removed FPS cap
VSync disabled by default
Game-tick input handling with per-frame edge detection
